subcodes.first_line: The All-Merciful beareth witness that there is no God but Him. Verily, He Who hath come with the truth can neither be known through remembrances nor described through attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الرحمن انه لا اله الا هو ان الذی اتی بالحق انه لا یعرف بالاذکار و لا یوصف بالاوصاف
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
